message:
feat(dispatch,backend): validate device IDs, return errors for invalid vmap axis specs, enforce out_axes=none identity

- Add device ID validation in CpuBackend::execute
- Refactor parse_vmap_in/out_axes to return Result with InvalidVmapAxisSpec error
- Add VmapUnmappedOutputMismatch enforcement for out_axes=none
- Add device validation and registry tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
